title: feat: add visual regression harness
description:
## Summary

Adds Playwright visual snapshots for the review UI.

## Test plan

- [x] Split diff layout
- [x] Unified diff layout
- [x] Description panel
patch:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 # differ
 
 Review pull requests from your terminal.
+Includes visual regression tests.
 
diff --git a/src/auth.ts b/src/auth.ts
index 3333333..4444444 100644
--- a/src/auth.ts
+++ b/src/auth.ts
@@ -1,5 +1,9 @@
 export function authenticate(token: string) {
-  return token.length > 0
+  if (!token.trim()) return false
+  return validateToken(token)
+}
+
+export function validateToken(token: string) {
+  return token.startsWith('differ_')
 }
 
 export function logout() {
diff --git a/src/visual/ready.ts b/src/visual/ready.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5555555
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/visual/ready.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+export function markVisualReady() {
+  document.documentElement.dataset.visualReady = 'true'
+}
+
+export function clearVisualReady() {
+  delete document.documentElement.dataset.visualReady
+}
+
